titleStmt.title: SII 41.168: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 168. (A.R. No. 386 of 1905.) Kāvēripākkam, Arakkōṇam Taluk, North Arcot District. On the south and west walls of the central shrine in the Sundara Varada-Perumal temple at Kāvēripākkam.

p.hi: Vijaya nagara Vīra-Kampana-Uḍaiyār, Saka 1292, Sādhārana, Kumbha, Purva 7, Rōhiṇi, Saturday = 1370, Feb. 3.

summary.p: Mentions the free village (taṉiyūr) of Kāvēripākkam, alias Vikrama-chōḻa-Chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Paduvūr-kōṭṭam, a district of Jayaṅgoṇḍa Chōḻa-maṇḍalam. Records the sale of their hamlet Kaḍapēri in Kalavaippaṟṟu by the śabha of the village to some Brāhmaṇas for the price of 400 vīrachampankuḷikai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . man mahāmaṇḍalecuraṉ Ariyarāya vipāṭan bhāṣaikku tappuvarāyar kaṇṭaṉpūrva Okṣiṇa pakṣima [uttara*] camudrādhipati śrīvīrapokkaṇṇa Uṭaiyar kumārar śrīvīrakampaṇa Uṭaiyākkuc cellā niṉṟa śakāptam 1000 2 100 9 10 2n mel sātāraṇa samvatsarattu kumbha nāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu caṉikkiḻamaiyum rohiṇi
yum saptamiyum peṟṟanāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu paṭuvūr koṭṭattu taṉiyūr kāverippākkamāṉa vikramacoḻaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bhaṭṭakaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷum Uḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom kaṉiṉallūr bhāradavāja gotrattu periyaperumāḷukkum kaṉiṉallūr vaṣiṣṭhagotrattu devarāja bhaṭṭaṉukkum tiruk
kaṭavūr kauśika gotrattu maṇṭalapuruṣaṉukkum tirukkaṭavūr viśvāmitra gotrattu Uḷḷiṭṭa nānāgotrattu bhaṭṭarkaḷukku kāṇivilaipramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Emmūr melpiṭākai Immaṇṭalattu Ikkoṭṭattu
kalavaip paṟṟu kaṭapperikku Ellai kīḻpāṟkellai kāverippākkattu kīḻnīrkālukku melkarai taṇṭukaraikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ikkālukku vaṭakku tiruppāṟkaṭal taṇṭukaraikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai veḷḷan tāṅkalukku kiḻakkum kaṭapperiyil niṉṟu peruṅkāvanallūrkku pokiṟa vatikku kiḻakkum
melpāṟkellai naṅkaiāṇṭāṉpaṭṭi Ellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Āṟṟaṟaip peruvaḻikku teṟkum Intaṉāṟpāṟkkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam piṭārippaṭṭi nīṅkalāka nattameṭu kuḷakkaṭṭu nañcai puñcaiērivāy puṟavaṭai Avaṉinārārāyaṇaṉ peruṅkōyil nīrviḻukkāṭum maṟṟum Epper
paṭṭa sakala prāptikaḷum Uṭppaṭṭa Intakaṭapperikku Emmilicainta vīracampaṉ kuḷikai pa4 100 Ippaṇam nāṉūṟṟukkum Intakaṭapperi vilai Āvatākavum Ippaṭiviṟṟuk kuṭutta kaṭapperi Ivarkaḷukku viṟṟu Oṟṟi pratikraya dāya dāṉaṅkaḷukkum Urittākak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi vilaikkuuṟa viṟṟupporuḷaṟak kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭut
tom kāvirippākkattu bhaṭṭakaḷum viśiṣṭarkaḷumuḷḷiṭṭa mahāsabhaiyom .
Digital edition of SII 41.168 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
